titleStmt.title: SII 26.776: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 776. (A.R. No. 725 of 1909.) ĀLAMBĀKKAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the same maṇḍapa.

This inscription records the gift of land of the extent of mukkāṇi (of 3/4 mā), at 729 kuḻi a mā, measured by the 12-foot-long rod, in the eastern quarter called Akaḷaṅkanallūr of Śrī-Madurānatakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Brahmadēyam in Poygai-nāḍu in Tribhuvaṉamuḻuduḍai-vaḷanāḍu, by the mahāsabhai- of the place which had met for the purpose in the Madurāntakadēvaṉ-maṇḍapam of the village. The gift was made to Āḷuḍaippiḷḷaiyār, a deity probably of the same place, and the land was made tax-free. As representatives of the sabhai persons belonging not only to the village proper, but also to Madurāntakachchēri Vaṁgipuram, Tribhuvaṉamādēvichchēri Kaṇḍēṟṟu, Kiḍāraṅgoṇḍaśōḻachchēri Neraṭṭūr, Vikkiramaśōḻachchēri Irāyūr, Kaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻachchēri Śiṟukōṭṭaiyūr, and Kāṭṭūr figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5 tribhuvaṉamuḻutuṭaivaḷanāṭṭup poykaināṭṭu bra
hmadeyam śrīmaturān=takaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ivvūṟ maturān=ta- katevaṉ maṇṭapattey kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟa
k kūṭiyiruntu Āḷuṭaippiḷḷaiyāṟkku kācu koḷḷāta Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭa nilam Ivvūr kiḻpiṭākai Akaḷaṅkanallū
rk kaṭṭaḷaiyil śrītevivatikku kiḻakku kāḷivaḻikku vaṭakku mutal kaṇṇāṟṟu munṟāñ catirattu meṟkaṭaiya panir Aṭikko
lāl 7 100 2 10 9 ku koṇṭatu Oru māvākap pottakappaṭi nila mukkāṇi Innila mukkāṇiyum kācu koḷḷāta Iṟaiyili
yāka viṭṭu cantrātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavitāka viṭṭamaikku Ikkuṟiyeḻun=tiruntu paṇittār maturān=takacceri vaṅkippuṟa
ttu karumāṇikkappaṭṭaṉum tribhuvaṉamātevicceri kaṇṭeṟṟu Āḷavan=tān paṭṭa num kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻacceri neraṭṭur Akki piṭārapaṭṭa
num vikkiramacoḻacceri Irāyūr tiruvaraṅka māṟṟipaṭṭanum kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻacceri ciṟukoṭṭaiyūr pinākapāṇibhaṭṭanum paṇiyāl
paṇippaṇiyāl Ivai kāṭṭūruṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu bhavasvāmibhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu mācaṟuco
tibhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu caṅkaranārāyaṇabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai taṇukkiṟa śrīmātavabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
villūr tiruveṅkaṭapaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaṇṭāṟṟu Āḷavan=tān bhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ivai ciṟukoṭṭaiyūr pinākapāṇibhaṭṭaneḻuttu
Ippaṭi Ivai vaṅkipuṟattu karumāṇikkabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr tiruvaraṅkamāṉa bhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku koṟukoṭṭik kaḷvabhaṭ
ṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai neraṭṭur Akkipiṭāra bhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṅkippuṟattu Anan=tanārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku
ivai vaṅkippuṟattu Iḷaiyabhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai neraṭṭur coppirar bhaṭṭaneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cāriyūr tiruvaraṅka
paṭṭaneḻuttu Iṉ nila mukkāṇikkum Antarāyaṅkoḷḷutal Iṟaikaṭṭutal ceyvār tiruvāṇai tiru
vi yākkal
Digital edition of SII 26.776 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
